name: hero-03
title: Hero 03 — centered + feature strip
description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height centered hero with an auto-fit 3-4 column card strip anchored at the bottom edge + background slot. Customise by editing the installed copy.

files.content:
--- /** * Hero-03.astro -- layout section: full-height centered hero + a feature * strip anchored at the bottom edge (the usual 3-4 column icons/features * row). Ships populated (frontend-contract.md §7): renders a * complete block; make it yours by editing this copy you own. * * The strip is an auto-fit grid (minmax(13rem,1fr)) -- give it 3 or 4 * cells and the columns adapt; narrow screens wrap. * * `background` slot: absolute layer behind everything. */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Button from "../Button.astro"; import Card from "../Card.astro"; interface Props { class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---

Everything above the fold.

Centered headline up top, proof points pinned to the bottom edge.
